channel.title: Coffee Methods on Barista At Home
channel.description: Recent content in Coffee Methods on Barista At Home

item.title: What Is Drip Coffee? How It Works, Taste, and vs. Espresso
item.description: Drip coffee is brewed by dripping hot water over ground coffee through a paper filter. Learn how it works, how it differs from espresso and pour over, and how to brew the perfect cup.
